overall.description: A cinematic drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring reflective wet streets and massive neon-lit structures. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 captures a vehicle traversing an elevated highway with red neon ceilings, exiting into an open plaza with towering digital billboards, and looping back under the covered roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with red neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward under the covered highway with red neon lights reflecting on the wet pavement

entered.detail: overhead highway structure with prominent red neon edge lighting creating a tunnel effect
illuminated advertisement mounted on the ceiling of the covered highway
glowing advertisement panel displaying 'REAL WATER' text
tall skyscraper with vertical 'softsys' neon signage
circular tower structure wrapped with multiple rotating holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered elevated highway bathed in red neon light. The wet asphalt reflects the overhead illumination while digital billboards for 'AVANTE' and 'REAL WATER' line the ceiling. The Softsys tower stands visible in the distance to the left, and a cylindrical holographic advertising structure rotates on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by mega-skyscrapers

events.description: exits the covered highway into an open plaza with unobstructed view of the city skyline
vehicle executes a wide turn to face back toward the covered highway entrance

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered structure and maneuvering through the open plaza to turn around

entered.detail: massive horizontal billboard featuring a cartoon character mascot giving a thumbs up
dark skyscraper with prominent red 'ORBITAL AIR' corporate logo illuminated on the facade
wide asphalt surface with painted lane markings and reflective puddles

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered highway into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. The massive 'All Foods' billboard dominates the view with its bright yellow illumination and cartoon mascot. The vehicle turns around, revealing the 'ORBITAL AIR' building and the cylindrical holographic tower now centered in the frame, before aligning to re-enter the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach ramp to covered highway with large roadside billboard

events.description: vehicle passes closely alongside the large All Foods billboard, temporarily filling the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: accelerating toward the covered highway entrance while passing the large roadside billboard

segments.scene_description: Driving back toward the covered highway, the vehicle passes extremely close to the 'All Foods' billboard, which now looms large on the right side. The red neon highway structure ahead grows larger as the vehicle approaches the entrance ramp. The Softsys tower remains visible on the left while the holographic advertising cylinder shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway with red neon ceiling and structural beams

events.description: re-enters the covered highway structure with red neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: driving steadily under the covered highway with red neon lights creating reflections on the wet road surface

entered.detail: curved red metal beams supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle re-enters the covered highway, once again enveloped by the red neon-lit ceiling structure. The curved support beams frame the view as the vehicle continues forward. The Softsys tower remains visible through the open sides of the structure to the left, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the intense red neon illumination overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from a red-lit enclosed highway into a vast neon plaza before looping back into the covered structure. It begins under a red neon ceiling where wet asphalt reflects overhead lights and digital billboards for Avante and Real Water line the path, with the Softsys tower visible in the distance. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a massive plaza dominated by a bright yellow All Foods billboard and towering skyscrapers, before the camera pivots to reveal the Orbital Air building and a rotating holographic tower. The vehicle then turns back toward the highway, passing closely beneath the looming All Foods mascot as the red neon entrance ramp grows larger in the frame. Finally, the camera re-enters the covered highway, where curved support beams and intense red illumination once again envelop the view while the Softsys tower remains visible to the left.
